name: P-3 --emit-telemetry writes token usage telemetry for the eval run per the architecture telemetry contract
command: mkdir -p evals/datasets/agents && printf '{"id":"r1","input":"x","expected":"y"}\n' > evals/datasets/agents/test-agent.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/prompt-eval.sh" test-agent --version 1.0.0 --emit-telemetry t.jsonl 2>/dev/null && [ -s t.jsonl ] && echo emitted 1>&2
